diagrams.title: Dynamic Array Growth Process
diagrams.description: Shows how a dynamic array grows when capacity is exceeded
diagrams.purpose: Understand the resizing mechanism and why it takes O(n) time

diagrams.title: Load Factor Thresholds
diagrams.description: Visual representation of when to grow and shrink dynamic array
diagrams.purpose: Comprehend when resize operations occur and why thresholds matter

diagrams.title: Memory Layout Comparison
diagrams.description: Contiguous memory of dynamic array vs scattered nodes of linked list
elements: Linked list: nodes at random addresses (100, 500, 200, 800)
diagrams.purpose: Understand cache efficiency advantage of dynamic arrays
